properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: 1. We've read it in the scripture We're living out each line Walking through the last days taking time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We see the times are perilous Evil grows each day In these closing moments All there really is to say

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: What a beautiful day, What a beautiful sometime, What a wonderful age It is to walk with Him, What a wonderful life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What an excellent place To share the saving grace To live the gospel way What a beautiful day

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 2. What an awesome honor, What a joy to know We're the called by God The ones He chose

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He's given us the power Heaven's light divine In the darkest hour And it's time for us to shine

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: 3. What a beautiful revelation To find the culmination of this life A celebration for the Saints The elevation of the Bride!
